seoTitle: South Gundurimba vs South Guyra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Gundurimba and South Guyra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Gundurimba vs South Guyra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Gundurimba and South Guyra.
heading: South Gundurimba vs South Guyra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Gundurimba, New South Wales and South Guyra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Gundurimba has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to South Guyra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Gundurimba or South Guyra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Gundurimba has a flood risk score of 53/100, while South Guyra scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Gundurimba scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. South Guyra scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Gundurimba or South Guyra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Gundurimba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
